name: How long do I have to report a ladder fall injury from work?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a ladder fall injury from work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report within 30 days typically; file claim up to 1 year, but sooner is better.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Report the ladder fall injury to your employer within 30 days in most states, though some allow up to a year for filing the formal claim.[1]

Prompt reporting creates an official record and starts benefits for medical and wages; delays can lead to denial.[3] Statutes of limitations for third-party suits are 1-3 years.

- Check your state's labor department rules.
- Document date, time, and details immediately.
- In Utah or Idaho, notify within 180 days for comp.

Act fast to avoid bars on claims; consult a local attorney to confirm deadlines.[2]

description: Report within 30 days typically; file claim up to 1 year, but sooner is better.[1]
